atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Purpose: Inject Tailwind generated layers. Contract: Accepts base, components, or utilities.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Purpose: Inline existing utility classes into custom CSS rules. Contract: Accepts one or more Tailwind utility class names.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Purpose: Place custom styles into Tailwind base, components, or utilities layer. Contract: Accepts base, components, or utilities.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Purpose: Set a custom Tailwind config file path per stylesheet. Contract: Accepts a config path string.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Purpose: Target Tailwind breakpoints inside custom CSS. Contract: Accepts a configured screen key.
